venue.name: MACC - Meeting Art Craft Center
venue.address: P.za V. Emanuele II, 5, 56125 Pisa PI, Italy
venue.description: A modern conference center located in the heart of Pisa, close to the Pisa Central Station and the historic center of the city.

directions.by_train: 4 minutes walk from the Pisa Centrale train station. High-speed train (Freccia Rossa) connections available via Florence Santa Maria Novella.
directions.by_plane: From Pisa International Airport (approx. 3 km away), take a taxi or the Pisa Mover city train to Pisa Centrale, then a 4-minute walk to the venue.
directions.by_car: Accessible via highways A12 and A11. Closest paid parking is Parcheggio Saba V. Emanuele. A free parking option is Park Pratale (30 minutes walk).
